exchanges.prompt: Design a cloud-native e-commerce platform using AWS S3 for product images and backups, Azure Functions for order processing and notifications, and GCP BigQuery for sales analytics. Use Kubernetes for container orchestration. Include CI/CD pipelines, autoscaling, load balancing, monitoring, disaster recovery, and secure communication between clouds.

response.content:
architecture-beta
    group presentation(cloud)[Presentation]
    group application(server)[Application]
    group data(disk)[Data]
    group infrastructure(cloud)[Infrastructure]
    group monitoring(cloud)[Monitoring]

    service web(logos:nginx)[Web Server] in presentation
    service cdn(logos:aws-cloudfront)[CloudFront CDN] in presentation
    service s3(logos:aws-s3)[Product Images] in data
    service s3backup(logos:aws-s3)[Backups] in data
    service azurefunc(logos:azure)[Order Processing] in application
    service azurefuncnotify(logos:azure)[Notifications] in application
    service bigquery(logos:google-cloud)[Sales Analytics] in data
    service k8s(logos:kubernetes)[Kubernetes] in infrastructure
    service ci(logos:docker)[CI/CD Pipeline] in infrastructure
    service loadbalancer(logos:nginx)[Load Balancer] in infrastructure
    service autoscale(logos:aws-ecs)[Autoscaling] in infrastructure
    service monitoringtool(logos:aws-cloudwatch)[Monitoring] in monitoring
    service dr(logos:aws-rds)[Disaster Recovery] in infrastructure
    service vpn(logos:aws-ec2)[Secure Communication] in infrastructure

    cdn:R -- L:web
    web:R -- L:azurefunc
    azurefunc:R -- L:bigquery
    azurefunc:B -- T:azurefuncnotify
    azurefuncnotify:R -- L:s3
    s3:R -- L:s3backup
    k8s:R -- L:ci
    ci:R -- L:loadbalancer
    loadbalancer:R -- L:autoscale
    autoscale:R -- L:monitoringtool
    monitoringtool:R -- L:dr
    dr:R -- L:vpn
    vpn:B -- T:k8s
    web:B -- T:monitoringtool
    azurefunc:B -- T:monitoringtool
    bigquery:B -- T:monitoringtool
